name: utilitarian app
activates: sticky-scroll-patterns.md when sticky regions, drawers, or tables are present
skips: web-animation-design unless motion is explicitly requested
designPosture: hierarchy through spacing and type before color
qualityBar: loading, empty, and error states present
touch targets and responsive behavior handled cleanly
visual hierarchy works without decorative color
the result feels like product software, not a template demo
recommendedInputs: existing product screenshots or live references
component library or design system guidance
DESIGN.md or filled project identity template
specific constraints around density, navigation, and states
humanJudgmentRequired: what the primary task flow should be
whether a new pattern is actually justified
when density is helping vs hurting
what deserves emphasis in the information hierarchy
promptFraming: build a calm, competent settings surface
prioritize clarity and flow over personality
use restraint. no decorative cards or color noise
mobile should preserve focus, not desktop density

humanJudgment: whether the interface needs more personality or should stay restrained
